title: JWT Authentication Service API Documentation
rationale: Docs mode requires doc-draft finalizer. Implementer needs tools=yes for file writing. Using qwen3.5:9b (tools=yes) for implementer as it's capable of generating comprehensive documentation. For project_manager, architect, qa planning roles, qwen3.5:9b provides sufficient capability without unnecessary overhead. All personas use ollama provider as specified.
summary: Generate API documentation for JWT-based user authentication service including endpoint references, authentication flow diagrams, and integration code examples
